name: Coordinate parallel research agents with OpenAI and n8n Data Tables

parameters.content:
## Coordinate parallel research agents with OpenAI and n8n Data Tables

### How it works

This workflow runs a manual research wave. It prepares topic and proof metadata, sends the same packet to two **embedded** charge sub-workflows in parallel (LangChain agents with OpenAI-compatible chat models), merges their returns, proof-checks that both produced usable findings, writes pass/block to Data Table `wavves_proof_gate`, then emits an accept rollup only on pass.

### Setup steps

1. Attach OpenAI (or OpenAI-compatible) credentials to **Chat Model Credential Slot** inside both embedded charge graphs (open **Run Charge A Workflow** / **Run Charge B Workflow**). Do **not** re-point Execute Workflow to other database workflows — charges are already embedded as parameter JSON.
2. Create Data Table `wavves_proof_gate` with columns: `outcome`, `proof_check_id`, `proof_check_name`, `recorded_at`, `wave_run_id`, `reason`, optional `merge_fingerprint`, optional `topic`. Reselect the table on the Data Table insert nodes if name lookup fails after import.
3. Edit **Prepare Topic and Locks** (`topic`, `locks`, `proof_job`) before each run.

### Customization

Add more parallel charge branches before the merge, tighten **Execute Proof Merge Code** acceptance rules, or extend the Data Table columns for your audit format. Keep proof-before-accept intact.

## Initialize wave inputs

Manual trigger prepares the shared research topic, locks, proof job text, and wave run id sent into both charges.

## Run parallel charges

Two embedded Execute Workflow charges run in parallel (A = findings/sources; B = adversarial gaps). Attach chat credentials inside each embedded graph.

## Evaluate proof gate

**Execute Proof Merge Code** sets `outcome` to pass only if both charges return usable status and findings. **Check Outcome Status** branches pass vs block.

## Record pass result

Writes a pass row to `wavves_proof_gate`, then emits the accepted rollup (`accept=true`).

## Record block result

Writes a block row to `wavves_proof_gate`, then emits the blocked rollup (`accept=false`).

assignments.name: locks
assignments.value: Bounded parallel research to proof-gated accept. Evidence in n8n Data Table wavves_proof_gate. Use chat-model credentials only (no hardcoded API keys). Free template. Core scope only.

assignments.name: proof_job
assignments.value: After parallel charges merge, named proof check Proof Merge Complete must write a pass or block row to Data Table wavves_proof_gate before accept/rollup may emit success.

assignments.name: research_brief
assignments.value: Charge A: cite-backed findings. Charge B: adversarial gaps and accept risks. Stay in Free v0 core scope.

nodes.name: Prepare Topic and Locks
nodes.notes: Edit topic, locks, and proof_job before each run. wave_run_id defaults to $execution.id.

nodes.name: Run Charge A Workflow
nodes.notes: Charge embedded (single-file submit). Attach credential on Chat Model Credential Slot inside the embedded graph.

nodes.name: Run Charge B Workflow
nodes.notes: Charge embedded (single-file submit). Attach credential on Chat Model Credential Slot inside the embedded graph.

nodes.name: Execute Proof Merge Code
nodes.notes: Named proof check. Emits outcome pass|block plus GATE-TABLE-SCHEMA fields (proof_check_id=proof_merge_complete).

nodes.name: Add to Proof Gate DataTable
nodes.notes: Create Data Table wavves_proof_gate from GATE-TABLE-SCHEMA.md before first run. Re-point this node to that table after import if name mode does not resolve.

nodes.name: Add to Block Gate DataTable
nodes.notes: Block path still writes a gate row (outcome=block) before Emit Block Rollup. Same table wavves_proof_gate.

nodes.name: Set Pass Rollup Fields
nodes.notes: Success accept/rollup only on this path after a pass Data Table row.

nodes.name: Set Block Rollup Fields
nodes.notes: Block path: gate row written; no success accept.
